Source: Perplexity API Documentation
URL: https://docs.perplexity.ai
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Perplexity API Documentation

## Core Offering
The Perplexity API Platform enables developers to "power your products with unparalleled real-time, web-wide research and Q&A capabilities."

## Available APIs
- Agent API: Third-party models with web search tools and presets for flexible AI interactions
- Search API: Raw, ranked web search results with advanced filtering and real-time data retrieval
- Embeddings API: High-quality embeddings for semantic search and RAG pipelines

## Core Capabilities
- Web search filtering by domain and recency
- Structured JSON responses via schema validation
- Multi-language SDK support (Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, cURL)
- Query batching for Search API
- Real-time data access across web sources
- Source domain filtering and recency filters
- Multi-query web search functionality
- Leveraging frontier AI models like GPT-5.4

## Getting Started
API key available through Perplexity console. Full documentation index at https://docs.perplexity.ai/llms.txt. "Getting started is simple and fast—make your first API call within minutes."

## Recent Model References
- OpenAI GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.2 variants
- Sonar Pro, Sonar Pro Reasoning

## Code Examples
Available in Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, and cURL formats.
